rationale: Ground truth shows a clean, unanimous approval with no substantive concerns, so recall is vacuously satisfied by both. X's central 'blocking' findings (three stale reliability tests in files entirely absent from the diff, with fabricated-looking exact line numbers and code snippets) are ungrounded and contradict the human validator's report that all tests passed, making X's REQUEST_CHANGES verdict poorly calibrated and its precision suspect. Y stays grounded in the actual diff, correctly lands on a COMMENT verdict matching the real LGTM/APPROVED outcome, and offers one legitimate, low-risk, actionable nit (missing ge/le constraints) directly tied to a diff line.
